title: Fix non-power-of-2, multi-dimensional array direct assignment

features.name: dynamic_array_of_multidim_unpacked_array_assignment
features.description: Code should include assignment to an element of a dynamic array (queue) of multi-dimensional unpacked arrays using nested indexing

features.name: non_power_of_2_dynamic_array_size
features.description: Code should include a dynamic array sized with a non-power-of-2 value used in nested multi-dimensional array indexing

features.name: nested_array_indexing_in_function
features.description: Code should include a function returning a dynamic array of unpacked arrays with computed index assignment inside a loop
